text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 78 

SNF_PRMRY_PMT 

LABEL: Skilled Nursing Facility Primary Payer Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the total amount paid for skilled nursing facility setting (SNF) stays by a primary 
payer other than Medicare. It is the sum of all the primary payer amounts 
(NCH_PRMRY_PYR_CLM_PD_AMT from each claim) in the SNF setting for the year. This algorithm 
includes claims
